title: CoherenceAssessment
description: Output of coherence-analysis. Assesses whether composed concepts form a coherent whole.

common_mission.description: The higher-level purpose shared by the concepts.

reformulable.description: How cleanly the purposes merge into a single statement. 1 = resist unification, 5 = read as one idea.

non_conflicting.description: How little tension exists between parts. 1 = subtly at odds, 5 = fully complementary.

notes.description: Additional observations, especially for any failed design checks.

demotions.description: Optional. Concepts being reclassified as Specs (or dropped) on the basis of consistent evidence across stages.

from_concept.description: Name of the concept being demoted.

to.description: 'spec' to reclassify as a SpecDefinition; 'drop' to remove from the design entirely.

signals.description: Stage signals supporting the demotion. Must include at least two distinct signals; a single weak signal is insufficient grounds for demotion.

rationale.description: Free-form context: which specific actions/state/cycles from the listed signals motivated the demotion.
